testcase.name: venvs.tests.test_common
testcase.error: venvs/tests/test_common.py:3: in <module> from filesystems import Path .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/filesystems/__init__.py:5: in <module> from filesystems._path import Path .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/filesystems/_path.py:4: in <module> from zope.interface import implementer .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/__init__.py:58: in <module> _wire() .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interface.py:1120: in _wire from zope.interface.interfaces import IElement .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interfaces.py:55: in <module> class IElement(Interface): .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interface.py:774: in __init__ self.__attrs = self.__compute_attrs(attrs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interface.py:793: in __compute_attrs aname: update_value(aname, aval) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interface.py:789: in update_value raise InvalidInterface("Concrete attribute, " + aname) E zope.interface.exceptions.InvalidInterface: Concrete attribute, __classdictcell__

testcase.name: venvs.tests.test_config
testcase.error: venvs/tests/test_config.py:6: in <module> from venvs import _config venvs/_config.py:11: in <module> import filesystems.exceptions .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/filesystems/__init__.py:5: in <module> from filesystems._path import Path .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/filesystems/_path.py:4: in <module> from zope.interface import implementer .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/__init__.py:58: in <module> _wire() .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interface.py:1120: in _wire from zope.interface.interfaces import IElement .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interfaces.py:55: in <module> class IElement(Interface): .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interface.py:774: in __init__ self.__attrs = self.__compute_attrs(attrs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interface.py:793: in __compute_attrs aname: update_value(aname, aval) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/zope/interface/interface.py:789: in update_value raise InvalidInterface("Concrete attribute, " + aname) E zope.interface.exceptions.InvalidInterface: Concrete attribute, __classdictcell__

testcase.name: venvs.tests.test_converge
